name_en: 😘5BB173MiuMiu Cherry New Bowling Bag, latest two-tone design, made of ultra-soft calfskin. The bold innovative design perfectly interprets MiuMiu's unconventional and free-spirited attitude. This bag is cool, capturing an exquisite multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. New canvas lining. It's no wonder it's popular all over the internet; fashion bloggers and celebrities love it.
name_cn:
😘5BB173MiuMiu Cherry New Bowling Bag, latest two-tone design, made of ultra-soft calfskin. The bold innovative design perfectly interprets MiuMiu's unconventional and free-spirited attitude. It's no wonder it's popular all over the internet; fashion bloggers and celebrities love it.
Size: 28 x 12 x 9cm with gift box🎁
